meaning: n.一种产于北美大草原的小狼,山狗
examples: A courageous vole takes on a coyote a hundred times his size in Yellowstone National Park, Wyoming.
On the other side of the rise, an endless impenetrable thicket of poison oak and coyote brush hides quail and other members of its guild.
Far up the west rim of the canyon, a coyote yipped twice.
Sarye crossed the desert at 14 with her mother and a coyote, a smuggler.
Besides the bison, we saw elk and moose, coyote, trumpeter swans and even a wolf.
